outreachPreview.name: Apoorv Kakar
outreachPreview.subject: Quick question for Razorpay
outreachPreview.html:
Hi Apoorv Kakar,

I noticed you're part of the team at Razorpay.

We've built an AI platform that helps sales teams automatically discover lookalike companies, find decision makers, and verify work emails.

Would you be open to a quick discussion?

Regards,
Shubhanshi
